title: Wemmbu styled Mace
description: Resource pack that allows you to use custom 3D texture for minecraft mace
body:
A custom 3D model and texture for minecraft mace that you can use ;)
Styled by Wemmbu and higly inspired by xynaxis_ UnstableSMP fanart

All credits to:
- wemmbumc (youtube) - you know why
- xynaxis_ (tiktok) - inspiration and motivation to do that (you should really check some of that fanarts ❤ )
